[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *vrothberg* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [vrothberg] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
code lgtm to me .. lets get the tests passing.

> code lgtm to me .. lets get the tests passing.

Found the needle in the haystack. The default config must _not_ set the `config.StorageConfig`, otherwise c/storage won't apply the correct labels to the created directories.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #3792) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
Now rebased. Still need to find the regression wrt to the container state.

@baude, note that this PR changes the behavior regarding cgroups v2 and crun (see https://github.com/containers/libpod/pull/4352/files#diff-32cf5e5691a70dd66cc0362db7d6d40cR541). It will auto-set the runtime to crun if running on v2. However, it's guarded by an internal boolean that can be turned on/off a build time.
@baude @rhatdan ... I can't believe we're (nearly) green. The one failing job is broken due to an old conmon version on the image.
